data.description: Fix-it minted during MA-24 verification. The operator's re-record is DONE and the pipeline replays end-to-end successfully (114s direct run, per-issue commits correct) — but tests/e2e.test.ts fails for four harness reasons found by orchestrator diagnosis: (1) STALE DIST: e2e invokes falcon-detective/dist/cli.js without building; record runs via tsx (source). A stale dist replayed with old model IDs → key mismatch → bogus 'cassette miss' (observed: dist had pre-MA-27 gemini-2.5-pro while cassettes were 3.1-keyed). Fix: build (tsc -p tsconfig.build.json) in beforeAll, or equivalent freshness guarantee. (2) WORKTREE LEAK: every failed/skipped run leaves .runs/e2e-test behind; the NEXT run dies instantly on 'worktree already exists', masking the real error. Fix: idempotent cleanup before run + always-cleanup after (keep on failure only under an explicit KEEP_RUN=1 debug env). (3) TIMEOUT: full replay is now ~114s pipeline + post-pipeline smoke; vitest testTimeout 120000 races and loses. Raise the e2e test timeout to 360s (test:full tier only; fast suite untouched). (4) CASSETTE DIR FALLBACK: gemini.ts cassetteDir() falls back to process.cwd()/fixtures/cassettes — a worker spawned from repo root silently resolves the wrong dir (already documented as a footgun comment in e2e.test.ts). Make the fallback package-anchored (resolve from the module's own location) and update that comment. Keep MA-26 fingerprint/guard semantics and e2e-guard tests green; extend e2e-guard coverage for the cleanup behavior if cheap. G-1: falcon-agent untouched.
data.title: Harden e2e harness: dist freshness, worktree cleanup, timeout, cassetteDir anchor

data.body:
REVIEW (own-reviewer protocol, diff ee20b4e vs origin/main@e81fba0)

Scope: 5 files, +215/-16, all inside falcon-detective/ (G-1 upheld — falcon-agent untouched; scripts/check-planted-defects.sh exit 0).

Verdict: APPROVE — no Critical, no Major.

Per-defect assessment:
1. Dist freshness — beforeAll runs 'npm run build' (same command as CI's build step; robust to the typescript@7 bump already on origin/main, unlike a hardcoded node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc path) via execFileAsync + 64MiB maxBuffer, 180s hook timeout. Correct.
2. Worktree leak — new tests/helpers/e2eCleanup.ts removeRunWorktree(): worktree remove --force → rm -rf fallback → unconditional prune (covers stale registration with dir already rm'd). Async, so the MA-26 no-sync-exec pin on e2e.test.ts holds. Called pre-run (beforeAll) and always post-run (afterAll) unless KEEP_RUN=1 (documented in-test). 6 hermetic guard tests cover every leak shape incl. mutation-safety outside .runs/. Correct; prune only touches registrations whose dirs are gone, so concurrent live worktrees are safe.
3. Timeout — 360_000 on the single e2e test only; vitest.config.ts 30s default and fast suite untouched. Correct.
4. cassetteDir anchor — module-anchored PACKAGE_ROOT (import.meta.url, valid from both src/lib and dist/lib since dist mirrors src), CASSETTE_DIR env priority + call-time resolution preserved (gemini.ts:173 semantics intact); e2e comment updated, explicit CASSETTE_DIR kept as defense in depth; README corrected. Correct.

Minor (accepted, not blocking): beforeAll builds even when guards will skip (~5s waste on non-e2e machines running test:full) — acceptable for the freshness guarantee and matches ticket wording.

Evidence: real replay PASSED under E2E_REQUIRED=1 in 110s in the ticket worktree (planted leftover .runs/e2e-test pre-cleaned in vivo; dist built from nothing by the hook; zero cassette misses; smoke test ok; afterAll left no worktree). Fast suite 152/152; tsc --noEmit clean; biome@1.9.4 (the version biome.json targets) clean, 60 files.

Pre-existing issues flagged (NOT introduced here): (a) 'npm run lint' is broken on origin/main@e81fba0 — biome CLI 2.5.3 vs unmigrated 1.9.4 biome.json (dependabot bump merged without 'biome migrate'); needs its own fix-it. (b) The fresh Jul-10 cassettes + .e2e-fingerprint.json are uncommitted on the primary checkout; this PR's src edit drifts the workflow fingerprint, so run 'npm run e2e:fingerprint' AFTER MA-29 merges, before committing them (cassette keys are unaffected — verified by the zero-miss replay).

PR opened: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/62 (head ee20b4e, base main). Real e2e replay PASSED under E2E_REQUIRED=1 (110s, planted leftover worktree pre-cleaned, zero cassette misses). Fast suite 152/152, tsc clean, biome@1.9.4 clean, planted-defects exit 0. Two pre-existing flags in the PR body: main's npm run lint is broken (biome 2.5.3 CLI vs 1.9.4 config), and .e2e-fingerprint.json must be regenerated AFTER this merges before the fresh cassettes land.

Merged (PR #62, operator-authorized two-step with revert #63). e2e harness hardened: beforeAll dist build, idempotent worktree cleanup (KEEP_RUN=1 escape), 360s timeout, package-anchored cassetteDir; REAL e2e proof 110s under E2E_REQUIRED=1.
